## Summary
What does this PR change and why?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new MCP tool
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Other:

## How I Tested
Manual steps, screenshots, or sample tool invocations:

```
example tool call → expected output
```

## Related Issues
Closes #

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] New tool descriptions are clear enough for the model to know when to use them
- [ ] No new dependencies (or, if added, justified in PR description)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` content in the diff
